_meta.notes: Field names and values match Surge Discovery create form (Full Mode, 9 steps)

tagline: Catch AI agent prompt drift before it silently breaks your Arbitrum protocol.
full_description: Driftlog instruments AI agent deployments on Arbitrum by recording a cryptographic fingerprint of every agent invocation — prompt hash, model version, tool call schema, and output structure — as an EIP-712 typed envelope anchored in Arbitrum calldata via the ArbSys precompile. When a new agent version is staged for deployment, Driftlog automatically replays a curated set of pinned historical inputs against both the old and new versions, computing a behavioral diff and blocking deployment if

logo.note: Surge requires PNG or JPG. Convert SVG → PNG before upload.

pitch_deck.note: Surge requires PDF. Convert PPTX → PDF before upload.

pitch_video.note: Must be public/unlisted YouTube URL. Max 800 seconds.

team_description: The team combines a smart contract engineer with prior experience building Arbitrum-native DeFi tooling and an ML infrastructure engineer who has worked on model versioning and evaluation pipelines at a production LLM deployment shop. Both founders have direct exposure to the failure modes of LLM agents in financial automation contexts.

roadmap.goal: Ship a working prototype that fingerprints agent invocations on Arbitrum and stores versioned metadata on-chain.
deliverables: EIP-712 fingerprinting module that hashes prompt, model version, and output schema and writes them as Arbitrum calldata annotations
Solidity 0.8.x on-chain agent version registry contract deployed to Arbitrum Sepolia testnet with ERC-7582-compatible interface
IPFS prompt snapshot storage integration with content-addressed retrieval by invocation hash

roadmap.goal: Deliver the automated behavioral diff runner and CI/CD plugin integrations for Hardhat and Foundry.
deliverables: Behavioral diff runner that replays pinned historical input sets against two agent versions and produces a scored semantic divergence report
Hardhat plugin (npm package) and Foundry plugin (forge script wrapper) that gate agent deployments on passing drift threshold checks
Configurable alert system delivering drift threshold breach notifications via webhook and Telegram bot with structured JSON payloads

roadmap.goal: Onboard three live Arbitrum DeFi protocols as design partners and harden the registry for mainnet use.
deliverables: Mainnet deployment of the agent version registry with access-controlled write permissions and a public read interface for third-party verifiers
Integration guides and reference implementations for liquidation-trigger and vault-rebalancing agent patterns used by design partner protocols
Dashboard UI showing per-protocol agent version history, drift event log, and invocation fingerprint lookup by transaction hash
